DEPT 8 WILLIAM PEAVEY, PRO TEM. SANDRA NAYLOR, REPORTER. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF JANG WING WHO WAS REPRESENTED BY HIS ATTORNEY OF RECORD, NILS ROSENQUEST. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF FOR RESTITUTION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISE AT 140 GARDENSIDE DRIVE #202 S.F. CA. 94131. STAY EXECUTION TO 7/6/93 AT 12:00 P.M. ADDITIONAL TERMS RECORDED ON THE COURT RECORD. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH, STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 7/6/93 12:00 P.M.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JANG, WING AS TO DEFENDANT TRUITT, DONALD DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JANG, WING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-22-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-30-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUITT, DONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 140 GARDENSIDE DRIVE NO. 202 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94131, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. WAIVES ALL CLAIMS FOR ENT AND RENTAL DAMAGES. PLTF. TO KEEP ANY AND ALL DEPOSITS OR OTHER MONEYS PAID BY DEFENDANT. WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 12:00 P.M. ON 06 JUL 93.
